title: Luffy Breaks the Wax Armor
description: On pages 11–14, luffy breaks the wax armor as luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap.
scene: Luffy Breaks the Wax Armor. Luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We can't let them get away no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Isn't what a real man does!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Welcome to my DORU DORU MANSION!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Where the real me is, I wonder...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It seems you've met the wrong match.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: We are Baroque work's most cunning duo!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: A simple- minded idiot who only relies on instinct and brute-force,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: will never be able to catch us...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I carry out all the missions assigned to me to perfection...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: The instant you turn your back on me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll stab your heart with a single strike!

summary: This part centers on luffy breaks the wax armor, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
